title: ADOLESCENT RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: PRINEVILLE YOUTH RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM ADOLESCENT RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides residential treatment for youth with substance use and mental health needs. Youth live in a coeducational setting for 50 days or longer. Focuses on building coping and life skills, preventing relapse, improving relationships, and managing emotions and stress. Youth receive individual counseling, attend daily group therapy, continue their education on site, and take part in daily chores, sports, and activities. Additional supports include access to a gym, weight room, rock climbing wall, equine therapy, and art therapy. 1333 NW 9th Street Prineville, OR 97754 Eligibility: Ages 12-17 Hours: Main Office: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Program: Staffed 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 447-2631 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 447-2631 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by services; accepts most private insurance, Medicaid, payment plans, and a sliding scale is available DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Child/Adolescent Residential Treatment Facilities Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities * Adolescents If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
